# Vendored browser libraries

These files are checked in so the static app can run offline and from `file://`.
When updating a vendored file, update the version/source and SHA-256 value below.

| File | Version | Purpose | SHA-256 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `xlsx.full.min.js` | SheetJS Community Edition 0.20.2 | Browser Excel parsing | `0DCBC967984DE297BD4233CBB77FEBAD8A396C72D8AC0CFAB09094D6D7F6E805` |
| `pptxgen.bundle.js` | PptxGenJS 3.12.0 | Milestone PowerPoint export | `CD078CA9E91C6F9E061EE0A3C310D6FF157C3A71B1DEA7F40FD53818017266FF` |
